sessions.title: C4C V3 OrganizationSync — schema + listener mapping done; blocked on Branden
sessions.summary: Built CloudEvents OrganizationSync for the C4C V3 connector. Three commits on us/CXCDP-36055_new_connecotr_v3 branch: (1) 00acf7e fixed duplicate listener id between ContactSync and IndividualCustomerSync, (2) bb521aa added the sap.crm.md.accountservice.entity.account schema to components.schemas with $ref pattern matching EC/Emarsys conventions, OrganizationSync wrapper using {data: {currentImage, beforeImage}}, (3) 09befc3 stripped 210 nullable type unions and removed top-level title bleed-through. Manually mapped 23 fields in CDP UI (8 identity + 4 communication + 10 address + 1 industry). Compiled ~25 unmapped fields into questions list for Branden. Created Communication System CDP_C4C_V3_Dubi_Org in C4C admin with OAuth2 client credentials. BLOCKED at C4C Communication Configuration step — Account event not present in Asynchronous Outbound dropdown, likely needs separate event subscription enablement step. Awaiting Branden response on three questions: (1) account event enablement, (2) ~25 unmapped fields, (3) isPrimary literal value setting.

sessions.title: CXCDP-38626 closed — PR #31 + PR #28 verified in dev, prod deployed; new follow-up bug prepared
sessions.summary: Closed out the 502 retry follow-up: verified both PR #31 (CXCDP-38626 — onFailureMaxRetryAttempts 3->8, log demotion to WARN, JobExecutionContext.success reset on retry) and PR #28 (CXCDP-38893 — depth-1 consent leaf fix) are present in origin/dev HEAD before prod deploy on 2026-06-07. End-to-end verification on jobId 0b450bf81ba04aa8b4d969c03725c732 (eu5-st1, 8 attempts, success on attempt 8, all logs WARN with 0 ERROR). Drafted Jira closing-stage description. Investigated remaining 'Completed With Errors' UI residue: traced to CustomerLogsService write-on-every-retry pattern (GenericApiReader.java:183 fires customerLogger.writeCustomerLog on every retryable failure, accumulates in <env>-CustomerLogsBus Kafka topic) + AudienceService IDXJobStatusService.cs:273 override pattern (forces 'Completed with errors' when ErrorsCount.Any() regardless of idx Succeeded). Three fix options identified, recommendation: option (b) — add IsRetry tag in Kafka write payload + filter RecordModelsRetries in AudienceService FullResultModel read path (finishes half-built feature). New bug pending file under epic CXCDP-36831 assigned to Yedidyah. Renamed CHUB Reviewer Slack app to 'CHUB Bot' with new geometric icon designed via Stitch (hub-and-spoke + retry loop motif on SAP blue). Pattern documented: chub-slack-bot's existing SLACK_BOT_TOKEN can be reused via curl for ad-hoc posts on sap.enterprise workspace, working around the official Slack MCP being on a different workspace.
